dependencies.source: README.md (build section), smart_build.sh:908 (dependency check), meson.build:89-92 (pkg-config dependencies)

build_commands.value: ./scripts/smart_build.sh (recommended) OR meson setup builddir && meson compile -C builddir -j $(nproc)

sample_commands.value: No explicit sample/example commands in README. Test executables in builddir/tests/ serve as execution verification.
sample_commands.source: README.md - no Examples/Quick Start section found

build_system.value: Meson + Ninja, C++17, with optional Conan integration (bingo build)

key_features.value: Unity Build enabled by default, ccache acceleration, libmcpp pre-built cache, mold linker (optional), fast_debug_info (split-dwarf), global PCH (optional)

execution_log.output: Container started successfully. Note: required multiple container recreations due to Docker mount caching resolving to wrong paths.
execution_log.problems: Docker mount caching caused wrong repo to be mounted several times. Fixed by using unique mount point name '/srcrepo' instead of '/repo' or '/workspace'.

execution_log.command: apt-get install meson ninja-build gcc g++ pkg-config libdbus-1-dev libglib2.0-dev libboost-all-dev libgtest-dev libssl-dev zlib1g-dev git ccache file
execution_log.problems: Multiple rounds of apt-get install were needed due to: (1) background auto-setup script holding dpkg lock, (2) OOM kills during bulk package installation (exit code 137). Resolved by installing packages in smaller batches.

execution_log.output: libmcpp.wrap updated to use HTTPS URL
execution_log.problems: Original wrap file uses SSH (git@gitcode.com:openUBMC/libmcpp.git) which requires SSH keys not available in container. Changed to HTTPS.

execution_log.output: Build targets: 436. Subprojects: libmcpp (cloned via HTTPS), mcbase (from libmcpp). pkg-config: dbus-1 1.14.10, glib-2.0 2.80.0. Compiler: gcc 13.3.0.
Build completed successfully. Generated 86 driver .so files, 13 library .so files, 50 test executables.
libLm75.so loaded successfully via dlopen. test_bus_base: 6/6 passed. lldp_test: 35/35 passed.

execution_log.command: docker stop verification-env && docker rm verification-env

process_timeline.result: Completed - extracted build info from README.md, meson.build, smart_build.sh, conanfile.py
Resolved mount caching issue, container running with correct repo

failures.likely_cause: ABI test requires dlopen of driver .so with hardware-specific initialization. May need _abi test infrastructure setup.
ABI test requires dlopen of EEPROM driver. EepromAbiTest.get_sr_data_from_sr_file failed - likely missing .sr resource files.
42 internal gtest failures. mctp_class_test.get_endpoint_path_with_different_parameters failed. Likely hardware/device tree dependency.
MCTP service test requires dbus/system bus or hardware simulation not available in container.
Segmentation fault in CSR1 chip object test. May require specific hardware initialization or device tree data.
Segmentation fault in SPI flash object test. Similar to above - likely hardware dependency.

results.result: SUCCESS - shared library loaded via ctypes.CDLL

documentation_gaps: No explicit 'Quick Start' or 'Examples' section in README - sample execution commands are not documented
Build dependency list is split between README.md, smart_build.sh, and meson.build - no single authoritative list
libmcpp wrap file uses SSH URL (git@...) which doesn't work without SSH key setup - HTTPS alternative not documented
No documentation on which tests require hardware vs can run in container-only environment
The 6 failing tests are not documented as 'expected failures in container environment'
No CI/CD pipeline configuration (e.g., GitHub Actions, Jenkinsfile) visible in repo root
Compilation time benchmark (~30min traditional vs ~23min smart_build) references specific hardware specs not documented

problems_encountered.problem: Docker mount caching resolved to wrong repo path
problems_encountered.solution: Used unique mount point name '/srcrepo' instead of '/repo' or '/workspace' to avoid Docker volume caching from previous containers.

problems_encountered.problem: libmcpp wrap file uses SSH URL (git@gitcode.com:openUBMC/libmcpp.git)
problems_encountered.solution: Changed to HTTPS URL (https://gitcode.com/openUBMC/libmcpp.git) using sed command.

problems_encountered.problem: meson: Dependency 'dbus-1' not found (pkg-config not installed)
Container OOM killed during bulk package installation (exit code 137)
problems_encountered.solution: Installed packages in smaller batches instead of all at once.

problems_encountered.problem: apt-get/dpkg lock held by background auto-setup process
problems_encountered.solution: Waited for background process to complete before running own apt-get commands.

problems_encountered.problem: mold linker not installed - fell back to ld.bfd
problems_encountered.solution: Build succeeded with ld.bfd. mold is optional optimization per README.

problems_encountered.problem: 6 unit tests failed (4 ABI/service tests with exit 1, 2 SIGSEGV)
problems_encountered.solution: Not fixed - these appear to require hardware-specific initialization, dbus, or device tree data not available in container. This is expected for a BMC driver project running in a generic container.
